prompt_text:
### Demographics: 38-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 2 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~22.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 79.7 kg; Height 183.4 cm; BMI 23.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 134/65 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.2%; 9 months ago 7.9%; 6 months ago 8.4%; 3 months ago 8.4%; current 8.8%), FPG (12 months ago 190mg/dL; 9 months ago 214mg/dL; 6 months ago 218mg/dL; 3 months ago 175mg/dL; current 185mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 82.3kg; 9 months ago 82.2kg; 6 months ago 77.1kg; 3 months ago 77.1kg; current 79.7kg), Height (12 months ago 183.4cm; 9 months ago 183.4cm; 6 months ago 183.4cm; 3 months ago 183.4cm; current 183.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 23.0kg/m²; current 23.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 131mmHg; 9 months ago 132mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 134mmHg; current 134mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 67mmHg; 9 months ago 65mmHg; 6 months ago 67mmHg; 3 months ago 65mmHg; current 65mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 36U/L; 9 months ago 37U/L; 6 months ago 42U/L; 3 months ago 40U/L; current 38U/L), AST (12 months ago 51U/L; 9 months ago 44U/L; 6 months ago 50U/L; 3 months ago 44U/L; current 48U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.5mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; current 37mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 129mg/g; 9 months ago 144mg/g; 6 months ago 113mg/g; 3 months ago 125mg/g; current 160mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 51mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 53mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 161mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 145mg/dL; 3 months ago 159mg/dL; current 153mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.9g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Poor adherence (estimated 50-70%); SMBG ≤1 time/week; lifestyle control poor.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
